originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'len' is never read

presenceCondition:
(or (and ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH BB_MMU)
    (and ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP (not ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH) BB_MMU)
    (and ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP
         (not ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH)
         (not BB_MMU))
    (and ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH (not BB_MMU)))
model:
(define-fun BB_MMU () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH () Bool
  true)
